# Sabudh Thapa

Sabudh Thapa (tsabudh) is a Software Engineer in Kathmandu, Nepal focused on backend systems, distributed systems, platform engineering, and data infrastructure. His strongest public signal is production systems work around event-driven workers, PostgreSQL, Kafka, DuckDB, Parquet, S3, OpenTelemetry, Rust precision paths, data provenance, and recovery from partial failure.

Primary pages:
- Home: https://tsabudh.com.np/
- About: https://tsabudh.com.np/about/
- Resume: https://tsabudh.com.np/resume/
- Blog: https://tsabudh.com.np/blog/
- Contact: https://tsabudh.com.np/contact/
- Backpressure system note: https://tsabudh.com.np/systems/backpressure/

Selected technical signal:
- Multi-source SEC identity projection with canonical people, affiliations, roles, resumable per-company runs, and field-level provenance.
- Wide screener query optimization from 8-22 seconds to under 600ms by routing analytical workloads to DuckDB over S3-backed Parquet snapshots.
- Kafka worker hardening with idempotent producers, deduplication keys, DLQ routing, retry/backoff, health probes, consumer-lag visibility, resource limits, and ordered shutdown.
- Production data recovery from a point-in-time database branch using PostgreSQL dblink, followed by migration safety checks for destructive SQL patterns.
- Rust Decimal arithmetic across a Python/Rust boundary for finance-safe precision paths.

External profiles:
- GitHub: https://github.com/tsabudh
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/tsabudh
- Medium: https://medium.com/@tsabudh
- Email: tsabudh@gmail.com
